depression.topic: Feelings of inadequacy after financial loss
depression.description: I constantly feel inadequate and like a failure because of my financial decisions. It's hard to shake the thought that I should have done better.
I find myself stuck in a loop, regretting my past financial choices and feeling angry at myself for not being more responsible.
I feel frustrated with my family for not supporting me more during this tough time, but I also feel guilty for needing that support.
The thought of having to work longer than I planned fills me with anxiety. I worry about whether I can truly support myself.
When I talk to my parents about my future, I feel this immense pressure to meet their expectations, which only makes me lash out at them.

Delusion.description: I often feel that I'm completely helpless and incapable of making decisions for myself. It’s like I’m a failure in every aspect of my life.
I believe I need my family to support me in everything, but it feels like they don’t understand how much I rely on them.
